title: Implement Command History Navigation
description: Ensure command history works correctly with up/down arrow keys. This should work through the shell's built-in history, but verify it functions within SwiftTerm. Also implement Cmd+K to clear terminal and consider adding a searchable history panel.
acceptance_criteria: Down arrow moves forward in history
agent_output: Volledig geïmplementeerde command history navigatie voor Rick Terminal. De implementatie werkt via de standaard shell mechanismen (zsh/bash) zonder custom code te schrijven voor history management.
